title: PlayCommand
description: Universal play instruction issued from `packages/core` to any adapter. Per ADR-0003.

mediaUrl.description: Resolved playable URL (audio.qurancdn.com, R2-hosted TTS, or HTTPS stream).

verseKey.description: Quranic context — drives word-by-word highlighting on UI clients.

announce.description: True if this is a duck-and-restore announcement (e.g., 'sabaq starts now').
